description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.  The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A dark, structured object with an appendage on its left side is visible just at the top of the reticle. A second, smaller, dark circular object is visible below the reticle in the bottom right quadrant. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B6
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025. The report consisted of a still image derived from a U.S. military system, which was altered with redactions before submission. An accompanying mission report was not provided, and the operator reported being unable to positively identify the UAP. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A dark, structured object with an appendage is visible near the reticle, and a second, smaller, dark circular object is visible in the bottom right quadrant. The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.
reported_object_description: A dark, structured object with an appendage on its left side is visible just at the top of the reticle. A second, smaller, dark circular object is visible below the reticle in the bottom right quadrant.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The bust_score is high because the document provides only a single, low-quality, grainy image from an optical sensor with no described kinematics or corroborating witnesses. The object descriptions are vague ('dark, structured object with an appendage,' 'smaller, dark circular object') and can easily be attributed to common mundane phenomena or camera artifacts under such limited observation conditions.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B6 - Page 1

[redacted]

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white surveillance feed showing a central crosshair reticle focused on a small, dark object. There are black redaction bars on the left and right sides of the frame.]

12/31/99 18:10:00
cover_up_reasoning: The document exhibits a moderate level of concealment. The presence of an initial '[redacted]' block and 'black redaction bars on the left and right sides of the frame' directly on the image itself indicates that specific visual information was withheld beyond routine name redactions. While not extensive across multiple pages, the redaction of primary visual evidence suggests more than standard administrative boilerplate.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告。该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像，该图像在提交前经过密文处理。报告未附带任务报告，操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。该单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，并带有中心十字线分划板。分划板附近可见一个带有附属物的深色结构化物体，右下象限可见第二个较小的深色圆形物体。图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。
reported_object_description_zh: 分划板正上方可见一个左侧带有附属物的深色结构化物体。分划板下方、右下象限可见第二个较小的深色圆形物体。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该事件的揭穿可能性评分较高，原因在于该文件仅提供了一张来自光学传感器的单一、低质量、颗粒状图像，且未描述运动学特征或提供佐证目击者。对物体的描述模糊（“带有附属物的深色结构化物体”、“较小的深色圆形物体”），在如此有限的观测条件下，很容易归因于常见的世俗现象或摄像机伪影。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件显示出中等程度的隐瞒。图像本身存在初始的“[已编辑]”块以及“画面左右两侧的黑色编辑条”，这表明除了例行姓名编辑之外，特定的视觉信息被扣留。尽管未跨多页广泛存在，但对主要视觉证据的编辑表明其超越了标准行政套话。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO
Report includes a still image from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
No accompanying mission report was provided
Operator was unable to positively identify the UAP
Image date is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
Image shows a dark, structured object with an appendage
Image shows a second, smaller, dark circular object
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张来自美国军事系统的静态图像
原始图像经过密文处理
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像日期因系统日期/时间未设置而有误
图像显示一个带有附属物的深色结构化物体
图像显示第二个较小的深色圆形物体
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The grainy, black-and-white nature of the image, combined with the vague descriptions of a 'structured object with an appendage' and a 'smaller, dark circular object,' are highly consistent with various optical or sensor artifacts.

Bird, bat, or insect at close range: A small animal flying close to the surveillance camera could easily appear as a dark, structured object with an appendage (like a wing or leg) in a low-resolution, grainy feed, especially with no described kinematics to rule it out.

Consumer drone (DJI / quadcopter): A small, dark consumer drone, particularly if viewed from a distance or in poor lighting conditions through a grainy camera, could present as a 'structured object' with visible components appearing as 'appendages.'
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头眩光或摄像机伪影：图像的颗粒状、黑白性质，加上对“带有附属物的结构化物体”和“较小的深色圆形物体”的模糊描述，与各种光学或传感器伪影高度一致。
近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：一只小动物在监控摄像机附近飞行，在低分辨率、颗粒状的画面中，很容易呈现为带有附属物（如翅膀或腿）的深色结构化物体，尤其是在没有描述运动学特征以排除其可能性的情况下。
消费级无人机（大疆/四轴飞行器）：小型、深色的消费级无人机，尤其是在远距离或光线不佳的条件下通过颗粒状摄像机观察时，可能呈现为“结构化物体”，其可见部件看似“附属物”。
cover_up_indicators: black redaction bars on image frame
cover_up_indicators_zh: 文件开头处的初始“[已编辑]”块
图像画面上的黑色编辑条
